etymology.description: 濟(濟) (jì, "assist; cross; aid") and 南(南) (nán, "south") combine to form the name of the city Jinan. Historically, Jinan is positioned south of the Yellow River, which is significant for aiding transport and communication.
etymology.interpretation: 濟(濟) (jì, "assist; cross; aid") comes from assisting or crossing waters, like the Yellow River. As Jinan is south of the river, 南(南) (nán, "south") was used to denote its geographical location relative to this major waterway. The name historically suggests the city's role as a hub of transportation and a pivotal crossing point along the South of the Yellow River.

examples.chinese: 济南是山东省的省会(濟南是山東省的省會)。
examples.pinyin: Jǐnán shì Shāndōng shěng de shěnghuì.
examples.english: Jinan is the capital of Shandong Province.

examples.chinese: 我有机会去济南旅游(我有機會去濟南旅遊)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ yǒu jīhuì qù Jǐnán lǚyóu.
examples.english: I have a chance to travel to Jinan.

examples.chinese: 济南的泉水非常有名(濟南的泉水非常有名)。
examples.english: The springs in Jinan are very famous.
